-c.description: Path to configuration file. Default will be path of the script and script name without .pl and .cfg instead

-S.description: SMTP gateway hostname or IP. Falls back to $smtphost in .cfg if not set.

-N.description: NetEye FQDN used to build IcingaDB links. Set via notification template custom property 'nx_neteye_web_interface_fqdn', or inherited from NxEmailNotificationMaster constant.

--ssl.description: Use HTTPS when building notification links. Passed whenever nx_neteye_web_interface_fqdn is set.

-r.description: Comma-separated list of all contact mail addresses that are being notified about the host or service

--notificationtype.description: Notificationtype. A string identifying the type of notification that is being sent

--datetime.description: Datetime (long or short as handed over)

--hostaddress.description: Address of the host. This value is taken from the address directive in the host definition

--hostname.description: Short name for the host. This value is taken from the host_name directive in the host definition

--hostalias.description: Hostalias. Long name/description for the host. This value is taken from the alias directive in the host definition

--notificationauthor.description: A string containing the name of the user who authored the notification

--notificationcmt.description: A string containing the comment that was entered by the notification author

--mail_sender.description: Sender email address. Set via notification template custom property 'notification_from', or inherited from NxEmailNotificationFrom constant via nx-nt-channel-html-email template chain.

-S.description: SMTP gateway hostname or IP. Falls back to $smtphost in .cfg if not set.

-N.description: NetEye FQDN used to build IcingaDB links. Set via notification template custom property 'nx_neteye_web_interface_fqdn', or inherited from NxEmailNotificationMaster constant.

--servicedispname.description: An alternate display name for the service. This value is taken from the display_name directive in the service definition

--serviceoutput.description: The full text output (aside from the first line) from the last service check

--format.description: Output format: 'text' sends plain text only, no HTML part

1801.caption: [NX] Notification sender (From)
1801.description: Email address used as sender. If not set, falls back to NxEmailNotificationFrom constant (set by NEP setup script).

1802.caption: [NX] NetEye Web Interface FQDN
1802.description: Hostname used to build IcingaDB links in notifications. If not set, falls back to NxEmailNotificationMaster constant.

1803.caption: [NX] Mail gateway (SMTP relay)
1803.description: SMTP relay hostname or IP. If not set, the value from mail-html-notification.cfg is used.
